overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, starting in an open plaza with reflective marble surfaces and neon-lit vending kiosks, transitioning along a tree-lined walkway with glass railings, and ending in a densely vegetated urban garden with rock formations. The wet ground reflects cyan and magenta neon lights from surrounding buildings, characteristic of the Cyberpunk 2077 game engine.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza with reflective marble flooring and vending kiosks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the open plaza toward the garden area, passing illuminated vending kiosks on the right

entered.detail: large polished marble plaza surface reflecting cyan and magenta neon lights
illuminated pink and purple vending machine structure with bright signage
small green kiosk adjacent to the pink vending structure
tall modern building with horizontal cyan neon strip lighting and glass facade
curved modern high-rise building with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide urban plaza at night, featuring a highly reflective marble surface that mirrors the surrounding neon lights. The camera moves forward past colorful vending kiosks toward a landscaped area, with modern glass towers rising on both sides creating a canyon-like urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian walkway with glass railings alongside landscaped garden

events.description: transition from open plaza to tree-lined walkway with glass railings on the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the pathway beside the glass-railed garden, moving past trees and urban landscaping

entered.detail: transparent glass barrier with metal posts separating walkway from raised garden bed
raised garden bed with mature trees and shrubs behind the glass railing
red paved strip running parallel to the main concrete walkway

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrower walkway bordered by a glass railing on the right that protects a landscaped garden with mature trees. The camera moves forward along the concrete path, leaving the open plaza behind, while the neon-lit building remains visible in the background now closer on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban garden with rock formations and tropical vegetation

events.description: entering densely vegetated garden area with large rocks and thick tree canopy

agents.ego_description: moving through the lush garden environment, passing large rock formations and dense tropical foliage

entered.detail: large gray boulder surrounded by lush plants and small blue flowers at its base
tall trees with thick canopies creating overhead cover and blocking the sky
lush green ferns and broad-leaf plants with some yellow-leaved specimens

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves into a densely vegetated urban garden where large rock formations and tropical plants dominate the view. The glass railing falls behind as the camera proceeds alongside the lush greenery, with the neon-lit building now visible only as filtered light through the tree canopy in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, reflective urban plaza into the secluded depths of a lush urban garden. It begins by gliding across a polished marble surface that mirrors vibrant neon lights, moving past colorful vending kiosks between towering glass skyscrapers. As the camera advances, the open plaza narrows into a concrete walkway bordered by a glass railing and mature trees, with the surrounding neon architecture shifting toward the periphery. The scene then opens into a densely vegetated sanctuary where large rock formations and tropical plants dominate the foreground. Finally, the glass railing disappears as the camera pushes deeper into the greenery, leaving the city's neon glow to filter softly through the distant tree canopy.
